errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee basis points exceed the 5% hard cap

errors.name: CreationFeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Creation fee exceeds hard cap

errors.name: MetadataUriTooLong
errors.msg: Metadata URI exceeds maximum length

errors.name: UnlockInPast
errors.msg: Unlock timestamp must be in the future

errors.name: UnlockTooFar
errors.msg: Unlock timestamp exceeds maximum duration

errors.name: UnlockNotAllowed
errors.msg: Unlock timestamp must be zero for Flexible jars

errors.name: NotOwner
errors.msg: Signer is not the jar owner

errors.name: NotAdmin
errors.msg: Signer is not the admin

errors.name: NoPendingAdmin
errors.msg: No pending admin transfer in progress

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Signer is not the pending admin

errors.name: JarNotActive
errors.msg: Jar is not in Active status

errors.name: JarNotCancelled
errors.msg: Jar is not in Cancelled status

errors.name: JarNotWithdrawn
errors.msg: Jar is not in Withdrawn status

errors.name: StillLocked
errors.msg: Time-locked jar cannot be withdrawn before unlock

errors.name: PartialWithdrawNotAllowed
errors.msg: Partial withdraw is only allowed for Flexible jars

errors.name: CancelNotAllowed
errors.msg: Cancel is only valid for Time-locked jars before unlock

errors.name: RefundNotAllowed
errors.msg: Refund is only valid for Cancelled jars

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Program is paused

errors.name: ContributorsRemain
errors.msg: Jar still has active contributors; cannot close

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Amount overflow

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Contribution amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: WrongAsset
errors.msg: Wrong asset type for this instruction

errors.name: ContributionJarMismatch
errors.msg: Contribution does not belong to this jar

errors.name: AlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: Contribution has already been refunded

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient jar balance

errors.name: CloseNotAllowed
errors.msg: Jar cannot be closed in its current state

errors.name: DisallowedUsdcMint
errors.msg: USDC jar uses a mint that is not the admin-approved canonical mint

errors.name: MigrationNotNeeded
errors.msg: Config migration is not needed (already at current version)

errors.name: AutoStakeDisabled
errors.msg: Auto-staking is disabled in config

errors.name: AutoStakeMintMismatch
errors.msg: Auto-stake jars must use the configured USDC mint

errors.name: AutoStakeUnsupportedAsset
errors.msg: Auto-stake not supported for this asset

errors.name: MarginFiAccountMismatch
errors.msg: MarginFi account does not match jar or config

errors.name: AutoStakeRequiresTimeLocked
errors.msg: Auto-stake on SOL requires a TimeLocked jar

errors.name: AutoStakeLockTooShort
errors.msg: Time-lock duration is below configured minimum for auto-stake

errors.name: MarinadeAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Marinade account does not match pinned program constants

errors.name: SharesUnderflow
errors.msg: Shares accounting underflow

errors.name: PrincipalUnderflow
errors.msg: Principal accounting underflow
